tool.name: OGS: Raster2PointCloud
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'Raster2PointCloud'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $input: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for raster2pointcloud --gamma '$gamma' --max-points '$max_points' --max-elevation '$max_elevation' #for $m in $input: --input "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --output output_1.vtp

param.name: gamma
param.label: gamma
param.help: Exponental increase coefficient. A value of '1' indicates a linear increase, smaller or larger values indicate a logarithmic or exponential increase, respectively (default: 1).

param.name: max_points
param.label: max points
param.help: Maximum number of points per pixel (default: 1000), (min = 0).

param.name: max_elevation
param.label: max elevation
param.help: Maximum elevation of randomly created points (default: 5000).

param.name: input
param.label: input
param.help: Input (.asc). Path to input raster files. Specifying 'file.asc' will make the programme look for a series of files called 'file0.asc', 'file1.asc', etc.

tool.help: This tool runs the **Raster2PointCloud** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
